tool_args.label: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights ("DDCR") has established a 22.5% DBE goal for the Design/Build Contract.

payload.entity_name: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project

payload.project_name: Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project
payload.description: Design-Build Services to provide Metro-North customers with service into and out of Penn Station via the existing Amtrak Hell Gate Line, including construction of four new ADA accessible Metro-North stations along the Hell Gate Line in the East Bronx

tool_args.label: Board Review - December 15, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Board Reviews To Date Approval Info Other 1 Board 12/15/2021 X

payload.description: Board review of the Penn Station Access Design-Build contract

tool_args.label: RFP Release - September 20, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: on September 20, 2021, the final RFP documents, modified to include, among other things, input provided by the respondents during the one-on-one meetings, was released.

payload.description: Release of final RFP documents for Penn Station Access Design-Build contract

tool_args.label: Proposals Submitted - October 25 and November 2, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Each of the three firms submitted a technical and price proposal on October 25, 2021 and November 2, 2021 respectively.

payload.description: Technical proposals submitted October 25, 2021; price proposals submitted November 2, 2021

tool_args.label: Expected Leggett Interlocking Installation - Q2 2024
tool_args.raw_text: until the installation of a new Leggett Interlocking, expected in the second quarter of 2024.

payload.description: Installation of new Leggett Interlocking expected in Q2 2024, allowing extended track outages of 45 continuous days

tool_args.label: OCIP Bridge Program Approved - June 2021
tool_args.raw_text: OCIP Bridge Program approved by the Board in June 2021

payload.description: OCIP Bridge Program approved by the Board
Base contract work and allowances for Penn Station Access Design-Build contract
Option to construct certain improvements at Metro-North's New Rochelle Yard
Total amount inclusive of base contract and option

tool_args.label: Stipend Payments
tool_args.raw_text: Stipend Payments: $ 3,000,000

payload.description: $1,500,000 stipend to each of the two unsuccessful proposers

tool_args.label: Contract Term
tool_args.raw_text: Contract Term 63 Months

payload.description: Duration of the Design-Build contract
HRJV Best and Final Offer amount
SEJV Best and Final Offer amount
TPO&GJV Best and Final Offer amount

tool_args.label: Amtrak Delay Cost Coverage
tool_args.raw_text: Amtrak will pay for Project delay costs up to $50,000,000

payload.description: Amtrak will pay for Project delay costs up to $50,000,000 if it does not provide agreed upon track outages and force account personnel

tool_args.label: Amtrak Contribution Amount
tool_args.raw_text: approximately $500,000,000

payload.description: Amtrak agreed to fund a percentage of total Project costs reflecting benefit it derives, approximately $500,000,000 based on current budget

tool_args.label: Allowances Amount
tool_args.raw_text: $32,000,000 in allowances

payload.description: Allowances within base contract for unanticipated hazardous materials, utility relocations, and city/state agency requirements

tool_args.label: DBE Goal
tool_args.raw_text: 22.5% DBE goal

payload.description: DBE goal established by DDCR for the Design/Build Contract

tool_args.label: Amtrak Weekend Track Outages
tool_args.raw_text: Amtrak will be contractually responsible for providing 30 weekend track outages per year

payload.description: Amtrak contractually responsible for providing 30 weekend track outages per year until Leggett Interlocking installation

tool_args.label: Extended Track Outage Duration
tool_args.raw_text: extended track outages of 45 continuous days

payload.description: Extended track outages allowed after Leggett Interlocking installation

tool_args.label: HRJV Selected as Best Overall Value
tool_args.raw_text: the Selection Committee unanimously recommended HRJV for award of the Contract. The Selection Committee determined that HRJV's proposal offered the best overall value considering that they were the highest rated technically and offered the lowest cost.

payload.claim_text: HRJV's proposal offered the best overall value considering that they were the highest rated technically and offered the lowest cost
payload.description: Selection Committee unanimously recommended HRJV for award

tool_args.label: Four New ADA Accessible Stations in East Bronx
tool_args.raw_text: construction of four new ADA accessible Metro-North stations along the Hell Gate Line in the East Bronx

payload.claim_text: The Contract includes the design and construction of four new ADA accessible Metro-North stations along the Hell Gate Line in the East Bronx
payload.description: New stations will bring increased regional accessibility to eastern Bronx communities with rail service to/from Manhattan and NY/CT suburbs

tool_args.label: Metro-North Service to Penn Station via Hell Gate Line
tool_args.raw_text: Contract CBX001 (the 'Contract') will provide Metro-North customers with service into and out of Penn Station via the existing Amtrak Hell Gate Line.

payload.claim_text: Contract CBX001 will provide Metro-North customers with service into and out of Penn Station via the existing Amtrak Hell Gate Line
payload.description: Additional passenger tracks, traction power substations, overhead contact systems, new interlockings, updated communication systems, and new signal systems within Amtrak's right of way

tool_args.label: RailWorks Responsibility Finding
tool_args.raw_text: RailWorks was found to be responsible notwithstanding Significant Adverse Information ("SAI") ... No new SAI has been found relating to RailWorks, and RailWorks has been found to be responsible.

payload.claim_text: RailWorks was found to be responsible notwithstanding Significant Adverse Information (SAI) pursuant to all All-Agency Responsibility Guidelines, approved by MTA Chairman and CEO in consultation with MTA General Counsel in February 2016. No new SAI has been found relating to RailWorks.

tool_args.label: Network Resiliency Enhancement
tool_args.raw_text: These additional tracks will not only provide a new service option for Metro-North customers, they will enhance Metro-North's network resiliency, support faster recovery efforts and facilitate Metro-North's ability to maintain acceptable levels of service when faced with planned and unplanned service disruptions, severe weather events and other emergency situations.

payload.claim_text: Additional tracks will enhance Metro-North's network resiliency, support faster recovery efforts and facilitate ability to maintain acceptable levels of service during disruptions, severe weather events and other emergency situations

tool_args.label: Funding Requires Capital Program Amendment
tool_args.raw_text: Funding for this Contract will require a plan amendment to the MTA's 2020-2024 Capital Program and this Contract will not be awarded unless and until that amendment is approved.

payload.claim_text: Funding for this Contract will require a plan amendment to the MTA's 2020-2024 Capital Program and this Contract will not be awarded unless and until that amendment is approved
